commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a private group/channel guard around gateway session display-name formatting, adds direct-session regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +54, Docs +1. Total +71 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main builds a group display name for direct Telegram entries with a truthy channel before label fallback, and the PR includes redacted live after-fix terminal proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can refresh the branch, preserve the runtime/test fix, and remove or rebase the release-owned changelog hunk if a maintainer promotes it.

target.title: fix(gateway): guard buildGroupDisplayName behind group/channel chatType
target.body:
## Summary

Both `buildGatewaySessionRow()` and `resolveSessionListSearchDisplayName()` in `src/gateway/session-utils.ts` were calling `buildGroupDisplayName()` whenever `entry.channel` (or the parsed channel) was truthy — without first checking whether the session was actually a group/channel. For a direct Telegram DM (`chatType: "direct"`, `channel: "telegram"`), the row's `displayName` would be formatted as a group label (e.g. `telegram:g-agent-main-telegram-direct-<chatId>`) and the explicit `entry.label` / `origin.label` (e.g. `openclaw-tui`) was never reached. Since the TUI footer renders `sessionInfo.displayName`, this surfaced as the wrong label in the footer / Control UI dropdown.

This PR adds a small `isGroupOrChannelDisplaySession()` helper that returns `true` only when `entry.chatType` is `"group"` or `"channel"` **or** the parsed key is a group/channel key, then guards `buildGroupDisplayName()` at both call sites with it. Direct sessions now fall through to `entry.label` / `origin.label` as expected.

The fix matches the approach proposed by `clawsweeper`'s review on the issue (shared guard at both sites; preserves the `openclaw-tui` label rather than hard-coding `Main Session` like #44561).

Closes #55354

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm test src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.telegram-recreate.test.ts` — 88 passed
- [x] `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/session-utils.ts src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.telegram-recreate.test.ts` — clean
- [x] `pnpm tsgo:core` — clean
- [x] Added three new unit tests:
  - direct telegram session falls through to `origin.label` (`openclaw-tui`)
  - group telegram session still uses `buildGroupDisplayName` (and does **not** fall back to `origin.label`)
  - direct session with `entry.label` set prefers it over `origin.label`

## Notes
- `pnpm check:changed` reports two pre-existing typecheck failures in `src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts` and `src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/openai-stream-wrappers.test.ts`. Confirmed against unmodified `main` — unrelated to this change.
- The helper is intentionally not exported; if there's appetite for re-using it elsewhere I'm happy to lift it into the public API surface.
target.author: sebuh-infsol
